parsed_denial_summary: Synthetic denial says the submitted record does not sufficiently document diagnosis severity for the requested therapy.

rescue_strategy.strategy_label: Resolve documentation gap with cited note and clinician signoff
rescue_strategy.rationale: The diagnosis criterion requires clinician-attested documentation, and mapping-diagnosis is marked needs_human_validation.
requested_actions: Keep appeal language administrative until clinician signoff is complete.
Include the source quote from mapping-diagnosis only if reviewer approval is present.
Route draft to Appeal Signoff before any appeal submission workflow runs.

unsupported_claim_warnings: Severity or medical-necessity language cannot be submitted until a clinician approves the final draft.
audit_summary: Denial Rescue Agent mapped documentation insufficiency to the documentation_gap rescue strategy with clinician signoff required.
